title: Flaky Test Quarantine Manifest
description: Registry of quarantined flaky tests with 30-day SLA for resolution

testName.description: Full test name as reported by Vitest or Playwright

file.description: Path to the test file relative to repo root

quarantinedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the test was quarantined (YYYY-MM-DD)

reason.description: Human-readable description of why the test is flaky

deadline.description: ISO 8601 date by which the test must be fixed or removed (quarantinedAt + 30 days)

rootCause.description: Category of the root cause of flakiness

linkedIssue.description: Optional GitHub issue URL or Linear ticket ID tracking the fix
